program: RAISE the STAKES AI Startup Competition 2026

company.name: ContestOps AI
company.tagline: AI-native operations for founders turning high-value opportunities into shipped products, evidence packs, and completed submissions.

answers.short_description: ContestOps AI is an AI-native operations workspace that helps founders turn high-value opportunities into shipped demos, evidence packs, pitch assets, and completed submissions.
answers.problem: Founders miss high-value opportunities because application operations are slow, manual, and evidence-heavy.
answers.solution: ContestOps AI reads opportunity rules, scores fit, generates application assets, builds evidence ledgers, and prepares or executes external form workflows through WAIBAv automation.
answers.ai_core: AI performs requirement extraction, fit scoring, answer drafting, critique, evidence-gap detection, and automation planning.
answers.business_model: Paid application sprints, monthly founder operations workspaces, accelerator/team seats, and success-based premium services where allowed.
answers.traction: Reusable opportunity packages and MVP demo are active; founder conversations, LOIs, and pilot receipts are the next evidence gate.
answers.raise_ask: RAISE exposure, investor intros, customer discovery, strategic credits, and access to AI operators who can validate the product.
